hypothesis: in-memory per-bot rate limit prevents auth DoS without adding tower-governor dep
reasoning: Global+per-bot caps on pending challenges prevent memory exhaustion without new dependency
learnings: DashMap iteration is O(n) but acceptable for 10K items
Constant-time secret comparison needs explicit implementation

hypothesis: shared-secret auth on validator server prevents unauthorized signing
reasoning: Axum middleware with constant-time bearer comparison; opt-in via VALIDATOR_SHARED_SECRET env
learnings: Axum middleware layers run in reverse order of registration
Constant-time comparison must XOR all bytes before returning

hypothesis: Secret<T> wrapper with redacted Debug prevents accidental key leakage
reasoning: In-tree alternative to secrecy crate avoids new dependency while forcing explicit expose() calls
learnings: MultiBotTradingState intentionally doesn't derive Debug/Clone
Every caller of .expose() is a potential audit point — grep-friendly

hypothesis: sync disk persist before CLOB submission prevents replay on crash
reasoning: CLOB orders are irreversible off-chain; best-effort persistence is insufficient
learnings: Defense-in-depth matters most for off-chain irreversible operations
Error paths must return 500 BEFORE submitting to external systems

hypothesis: raising virtual offset from 1 to 1e6 strengthens inflation attack resistance without breaking flows
reasoning: OZ defaults to offset=1 but production recommendation is 1e3-1e6; larger values make inflation attacks economically infeasible
learnings: Virtual offset changes introduce rounding proportional to offset size
Existing tests with 1-wei tolerance need to widen to match new offset
1e6 offset costs ~0.0000001% precision on standard 18-decimal assets

hypothesis: adding getBrokenVaults() view surfaces silently-excluded vaults to admins
reasoning: totalNAV() try/catches broken vaults silently; admins need a way to detect this without off-chain vault-by-vault testing
learnings: View functions can't emit events; use dedicated query methods instead
Separate visibility endpoint from business logic to avoid gas cost on happy path

hypothesis: error message redaction prevents internal detail leakage to HTTP clients
reasoning: alloy error messages may echo key format details; log server-side with tracing, return generic message to clients
learnings: Always separate server-side logging (detailed) from client-side error responses (generic)
tracing::error! is the right pattern for PII-adjacent errors

hypothesis: 13 adversarial tests close every untested engine branch
reasoning: Self-assessment identified 10 adversarial gaps — short positions never tested, trailing stop activation untested, cost aggregates unverified, promotion thresholds unverified
learnings: Short position tests found no bugs — the direction-agnostic level_price() helper works correctly
Trailing stop test confirmed activation + trail + profit lock-in works end-to-end
should_promote() threshold test hardcodes known values — catches regressions in the 10%/5% criteria

hypothesis: TradingBotRecord.harness_json survives restarts and is updatable via operator API
reasoning: Harness config only existed in sidecar filesystem (ephemeral). Must survive container restarts and be queryable from operator API.
learnings: #[serde(default)] ensures backward compat for existing bot records
state::update_harness validates both JSON parse AND HarnessConfig::validate() before persisting
UpdateConfigRequest with optional harness_json field is backward-compatible — existing API clients unaffected

hypothesis: vault resolution fix + standalone cron + self-improving prompt enables autonomous self-improving trading
lever: activate.rs vault resolution + prompts/mod.rs meta-harness prompt
reasoning: 6 infrastructure fixes required: vault address mismatch, token encryption, port mapping, runner crash, HTTP timeout, state dir. All resolved. Bot ran 31 consecutive ticks (3.5h) with 11 trades and 20 skips showing genuine market analysis (Wyckoff springs, false breakdown detection, consolidation tracking).
learnings: Vault factory address stored as placeholder in provision — BSM creates real vault on-chain but never updates operator record
SESSION_AUTH_SECRET must be consistent across restarts or all encrypted sandbox records break
PersistentStore overwrites file edits on any write — must restart process after manual edits
REQUEST_TIMEOUT_SECS=300 needed for AI inference (default 30s too short)
Self-improving prompt gives bot permission to write code — actual self-modification awaiting iteration 40 meta-cycle

hypothesis: deploy-only forge script unblocks vault deploy without touching live bp13
action: created contracts/script/DeployTradingContracts.s.sol (PolicyEngine+TradeValidator+FeeDistributor+VaultFactory+impl+deployers, Base Sepolia token set, no ITangle)
verify: forge build exit 0, no blueprint registration calls
result: DONE; deploy gated only on funding 0x2420 (0.00286 ETH, insufficient)
productValueClaim: non-custodial agent trading on a real chain = the product thesis; this is the difference between demo and fundable product

hypothesis: wider search helps once the gate is fixable; gate is the true blocker
action: populationSize 8->16, maxGenerations 4->6, promoteTopK 3->5 in harness-self-improve.ts + per-bot-self-improve.ts
result: KEEP as config; necessary-not-sufficient. Root cause located: evolution.rs:389-417 requires >=20 paper trades tagged to candidate; candidates are backtest-only so paper_evidence=None forever. Tagging infra (execute.rs:2224) exists but unorchestrated.
productValueClaim: self-improving agents = the moat; 0 promotions today means the loop is theater; the conductor build flips 0->1

hypothesis: the dead-end is the enrollment layer running the gate before paper evidence can exist; flipping backtest-passers to a paper_trial lifecycle (on the existing store, no TS duplication) unblocks promotion
action: evolution_store: status lifecycle module + trial_deadline/trades_target fields + get/update/list_non_terminal; evolution.rs self_improve_inner: backtest-pass+no-evidence -> PAPER_TRIAL instead of blocked
verify: cargo check -p trading-http-api green; cargo test evolution_store:: 1 passed; no regression
result: FOUNDATION LANDED (de-duplicated: TS owns generation/search untouched; Rust additive lifecycle reusing evolution_store/sandbox_store/trade_store/promotion_gate_inner). Metric still 0 until activation+tagging+sweep + box deploy.
productValueClaim: removes the structural reason 0/15 historical runs promoted; first real promotion = a measurably better strategy auto-deployed

hypothesis: the paper-trial machinery exists but is unorchestrated; a box-side conductor (lib, owning bots+tick) that activates backtest-passers as the bot's live paper harness, tags their trades, and runs the existing gate closes the loop without duplicating the TS optimizer
action: BacktestConfig.harness->bot.harness_json mapping (lossless); trial_marker store (http-api) + execute.rs server-side tag fallback on 2 paper paths; run_promotion_gate exposed; self_improve enrollment -> BACKTEST_PASS queue; promotion_conductor.rs (lib): activate(oldest queued -> swap harness + marker + PAPER_TRIAL) / evaluate (>=target -> gate -> PROMOTED keep | reject/expire -> TABLED revert); wired into workflow_tick (paper bots only, 1 slot/bot)
verify: cargo check --workspace green (production); cargo test -p trading-http-api -p trading-blueprint-lib --lib = 228 passed 0 failed
result: FULL CONDUCTOR BUILT + compiles + unit-green. De-dup held: TS generation untouched, all Rust reuses evolution_store/sandbox_store/trade_store/promotion_gate_inner. Metric 0->1 still needs: (a) candidates generated on box (TS agent tool / manual self-improve call), (b) on-box deploy + a trial accruing >=20 tagged paper trades.
productValueClaim: closes the structural dead-end end-to-end; once a candidate runs a 7-day paper trial and clears the gate, the bot autonomously adopts a measurably better strategy

hypothesis: a sandbox-local cadence closes the dormant/delegation gap without moving generation into Rust
action: added trading-blueprint-lib self_improvement_cadence to periodically launch MCP task maintenance and TS-side self-improvement generation for active paper bots with no trial/non-terminal run; wired cadence after promotion conductor in workflow_tick; added TS candidate mutation/probing via /evolution/promotion-gate; added conductor activation integration test; fixed stale TradeRecord fixture
verify: cargo check --workspace; cargo test -p trading-blueprint-lib self_improvement_cadence --lib -- --nocapture; cargo test -p trading-blueprint-lib --test integration test_promotion_conductor_activates_queued_backtest_pass_candidate -- --nocapture; cargo test --workspace --lib; cargo clippy -p trading-blueprint-bin --tests -- -D warnings -A clippy::collapsible-if -A clippy::manual-inspect -A clippy::needless-question-mark -A clippy::too-many-arguments; cargo test -p trading-http-api --test api_tests evolution_promotion_gate -- --nocapture; cargo test -p trading-http-api --test api_tests self_improvement -- --nocapture; npm run typecheck:evals; npx tsc --target ES2022 --module ESNext --moduleResolution Bundler --noEmit --skipLibCheck trading-blueprint-lib/src/prompts/tools/self_improvement_loop.ts; forge build
result: KEEP. Local loop is now scheduled, resumable, activation-tested, and API-gate verified. Metric remains 0 until deployed box accrues >=20 tagged paper trades and a run reaches PROMOTED.
productValueClaim: turns the self-improvement moat from dormant/backtest-only into a live paper-trial pipeline that can survive stalled delegated executions and promote only on persisted forward evidence

hypothesis: promotion should allocate bounded live risk instead of forcing paper evidence for every time-sensitive candidate
action: added EvidenceReport/RiskBudgetDecision store; promotion-gate returns tiny_live/live_probe for time-sensitive hard-gate passers; certified-without-forward-evidence remains a bounded probe; /execute enforces risk_budget_decision_id across CLOB, Hyperliquid, and vault dispatch; enforcement fails closed on malformed caps and wrong candidate/revision, and reserves counted probes before dispatch; TS self-improvement and Polymarket submit-trade carry risk budgets
verify: cargo check --workspace; cargo clippy -p trading-http-api --tests -- -D warnings -A clippy::collapsible-if -A clippy::manual-inspect -A clippy::needless-question-mark -A clippy::too-many-arguments; cargo test --workspace --lib; cargo test -p trading-http-api --test api_tests evolution_promotion_gate -- --nocapture; cargo test -p trading-http-api --test api_tests self_improvement -- --nocapture; cargo test -p trading-http-api routes::execute --lib -- --nocapture; cargo test -p trading-http-api risk_budget --lib -- --nocapture; cargo test -p trading-blueprint-lib --test integration test_promotion_conductor_activates_queued_backtest_pass_candidate -- --nocapture; npm run typecheck:evals; npx tsc --target ES2022 --module ESNext --moduleResolution Bundler --noEmit --skipLibCheck trading-blueprint-lib/src/prompts/tools/self_improvement_loop.ts
result: KEEP. Agents can receive auditable tiny_live/live_probe decisions without paper approval and /execute fails closed outside the decision envelope.
productValueClaim: time-sensitive prediction/news strategies can act with bounded downside before paper evidence arrives, while live capital remains mechanically capped and auditable across current venue branches

hypothesis: Hyperliquid outcome markets should reuse Hyperliquid execution transport but inherit prediction-market metadata, valuation, and max-loss semantics
action: added shared hyperliquid_intent helper for validate/execute asset resolution (#N and 100000000+ encodings); priced Hyperliquid trades from asset_size*price/notional_usdc; tagged Hyperliquid outcomes as PredictionTradeMetadata; clamped/enforced binary outcome live-probe notional to max_loss_usd; updated provider/system prompts and TS risk-budget venue inference
verify: cargo check --workspace; cargo clippy -p trading-http-api -p trading-runtime -p trading-blueprint-lib --tests -- -D warnings -A clippy::collapsible-if -A clippy::manual-inspect -A clippy::needless-question-mark -A clippy::too-many-arguments; cargo test --workspace --lib; cargo test -p trading-http-api risk_budget --lib -- --nocapture; cargo test -p trading-http-api routes::execute --lib -- --nocapture; cargo test -p trading-http-api --test api_tests evolution_promotion_gate -- --nocapture; cargo test -p trading-runtime hyperliquid::tests::parses_encoded_outcome_asset_symbols --lib -- --nocapture; cargo test -p trading-blueprint-lib providers::hyperliquid --lib -- --nocapture; npx tsc --target ES2022 --module ESNext --moduleResolution Bundler --noEmit --skipLibCheck trading-blueprint-lib/src/prompts/tools/self_improvement_loop.ts
result: KEEP. Hyperliquid outcomes can now be handled similar to Polymarket for risk and audit, while retaining Hyperliquid transport and asset IDs.
productValueClaim: agents can act on time-sensitive Hyperliquid prediction opportunities under the same bounded-loss, auditable live-probe model as Polymarket instead of waiting for paper evidence or bypassing prediction-specific risk gates
